name: DIABETES INSIPIDUS
definition: characterized by daily production of very large volume of dilute urine (specific gravity < HYPOTHALAMIC DIABETES INSIPIDUS VASOPRESSIN-SENSITIVE DIABETES INSIPIDUS vasopressin (ADH) production is reduced to < 10% compulsive intake of large amounts of fluid → inhibits normal vasopressin production poor reabsorption of water in collecting ducts ← end-organ resistance to vasopressin

clinical.Rx: thiazide diuretics, low-salt diet, encouragement of frequent micturition, indomethacin
